findings.evidence: `DiscriminantEquality.lean:7-9` imports all three; `mathlib/Mathlib/NumberTheory/NumberField/Discriminant/Defs.lean:8-9` already publicly imports `Mathlib.RingTheory.Localization.NormTrace`, and `NormTrace.lean:8` imports `Localization.Module`, which imports `Basis.Basic`, which publicly imports `LinearIndependent.Basic` at `mathlib/Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Basis/Basic.lean:8-9`.
findings.fix: Keep `Mathlib.NumberTheory.NumberField.Discriminant.Defs` and remove the extra imports on lines 8-9 unless the file is refactored to need them independently.
findings.issue: `Mathlib.RingTheory.Localization.NormTrace` and `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.LinearIndependent.Basic` are redundant public imports here.

summary: The new declarations are in the EffectiveBounds discriminant area, but the file adds redundant public Mathlib imports that are already provided by its first import.
